name: POF_binding_domain_chr4
description: Painting of fourth (POF) chromatin binding domain — covers the entire chr4 euchromatic arm. POF interacts with HP1a to produce a unique chromatin state combining heterochromatic histone marks (H3K9me3) with active transcription. The MSL-like system on chr4 (not classical X dosage compensation) upregulates many chr4 genes.
